docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT REIMER, TOM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROMERO, CRISBENRIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REIMER, TOM $1,754.71 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,784.71, OCTOBER 10, 2007 DAMAGE ASSESSMENT DOES NOT INDICATE DAMAGE IN AREA CLAIMED BY PLAINTIFF. THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF INITIAL DAMAGE ESTIMATE IS REASONABLE AND PLAINTIFF SHOULD NOT HAVE TO TRAVEL OUT OF AREA TO HAVE REPAIRS DONE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,402.86 FILED BY ROMERO, CRISBENRIC AS TO DEFENDANT REIMER, TOM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-26-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00). SERVED DEC-05-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REIMER, TOM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-26-2007 - JUDGMENT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM GEOFFREY HOWARD, CLERK S. VANTREE, NOT REPORTED. (506).
